Class JsonSerializer

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.store.serializer.JsonSerializer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializer
public class JsonSerializer extends Object implements Serializer
Jackson-backed Serializer that converts payloads to/from JSON using a provided ObjectMapper.

All methods are null-safe: a null input returns null without delegating to the underlying ObjectMapper.

Author:
Anand Manissery
See Also:

      public JsonSerializer()

  • Method Details

    • serialize

      public <T> @Nullable String serialize(@Nullable T payload)
      Serializes payload to its string representation.

      Delegates to ObjectMapper.writeValueAsString(Object).

      Specified by:
      serialize in interface Serializer
      Type Parameters:
      T - the payload type
      Parameters:
      payload - the object to serialize; null is allowed
      Returns:
      the serialized string, or null if payload is null

    • deserialize

      public <T> @Nullable T deserialize(@Nullable String payload, Class<T> clazz)
      Deserializes payload back to an instance of clazz.

      Delegates to ObjectMapper.readValue(String, Class).

      Specified by:
      deserialize in interface Serializer
      Type Parameters:
      T - the target type
      Parameters:
      payload - the serialized string; null is allowed
      clazz - the target class; null is allowed
      Returns:
      the deserialized object, or null if either argument is null

    • toClassName

      public <T> @Nullable String toClassName(@Nullable T payload)
      Returns the fully-qualified class name of payload's runtime type.
      Specified by:
      toClassName in interface Serializer
      Type Parameters:
      T - the payload type
      Parameters:
      payload - the object whose class name is needed; null is allowed
      Returns:
      payload.getClass().getName(), or null if payload is null

    • toClass

      public <T> @Nullable Class<T> toClass(@Nullable String className)
      Resolves a Class from its fully-qualified name.

      ClassNotFoundException is rethrown as an unchecked exception via @SneakyThrows.

      Specified by:
      toClass in interface Serializer
      Type Parameters:
      T - the expected type
      Parameters:
      className - the fully-qualified class name; null is allowed
      Returns:
      the resolved Class, or null if className is null
